write a python function to calculate the average color of a list of rgb color values

the function should take a list of tuples as input where each tuple represents an rgb color value

the function should return a tuple representing the average rgb color value rounded to the nearest integer

the function should handle cases where the list is empty or contains invalid values

the function should compute the average of the red, green, and blue components separately

the function should round each component to the nearest integer before returning

the function should be efficient for large lists of rgb values

the function should not use any external libraries
